subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Beauty of Bahá! Though they have plundered thy house, laid waste thy dwelling, and despoiled thy nest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب روی بها هر چند خانه بتالان دادی و کاشانه بتاراج لانه ات بروفتند و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcending the material condition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
